---
title: "Religion by Neighbourhood"
description: "Religious groups across Canada's cities, by census tract — 2021 Census"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import os
import json
import pandas as pd
from pipeline.charts import choropleth_groups_map
```

The share of each major religion in every **census tract** — roughly a neighbourhood of
2,500–8,000 people — from the 2021 Census. **Use the dropdown to switch between groups, and
zoom and pan to your own area.** Census tracts cover cities and larger towns; sparsely
populated rural areas aren't divided into tracts, so they appear blank.

Religion is self-reported and asked only once a decade. This is a descriptive picture of
residential geography — there is no "good" or "bad" reading here. **"No religion / secular"** is
now the second-largest group nationally and is included; the many Christian denominations are
rolled into a single "Christian" total. Religion is a separate concept from ethnicity and from
Indigenous identity.

This detailed view lives on its own page (≈3 MB of boundary data) so the main
[Population](index.qmd) page stays fast to load.

[← Back to Population](index.qmd)

```{python}
#| echo: false
geo_path = "data/geo/ct_2021.geojson"
rel_path = "data/geo/statcan_ct_religion_2021.csv"
if os.path.exists(geo_path) and os.path.exists(rel_path):
    ct_geo = json.load(open(geo_path))
    ct_df = pd.read_csv(rel_path, dtype={"ctuid": str})
    groups = [("christian", "Christian"), ("no_religion", "No religion / secular"),
              ("muslim", "Muslim"), ("hindu", "Hindu"), ("sikh", "Sikh"),
              ("buddhist", "Buddhist"), ("jewish", "Jewish"),
              ("indigenous_spirituality", "Traditional Indigenous spirituality"),
              ("other_religion", "Other religions & spiritual traditions")]
    fig = choropleth_groups_map(ct_geo, ct_df, "ctuid", groups, name_col="name",
        colorscale="Teal", height=720,
        source_note="Source: 2021 Census (Statistics Canada, Census Profile 98-401-X2021007); % of population in private households by census tract. Religion is self-reported. Descriptive only.")
    fig.show(config={"displaylogo": False, "scrollZoom": True, "modeBarButtonsToRemove": ["lasso2d", "select2d"]})
else:
    print("Census-tract religion map not available — run `python -m pipeline.build_census_geo`.")
```

[← Back to Population](index.qmd)
